title: Flea Treatment in St. George, Staten Island | $350-$650 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment services in St. George, Staten Island. Fast, effective flea extermination for homes and apartments. Call Best Pest Control NYC today!
intro: St. George, Staten Island's vibrant waterfront neighborhood, is home to beautiful historic buildings, modern apartments, and family residences that can all fall victim to flea infestations. Whether you're near the Staten Island Ferry Terminal, in one of the charming brownstones along Hamilton Avenue, or in a newer apartment complex, fleas can quickly become a nightmare for pets and families alike. Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, effective flea treatment services throughout St. George with pricing from $350 to $650 depending on property size and infestation severity.
whyUs: Our technicians have extensive experience treating flea infestations in St. George's diverse housing stock, from pre-war walk-ups to waterfront condos. We use pet-safe, EPA-approved treatments and offer same-day service to quickly eliminate fleas at all life stages, backed by our satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: St. George's proximity to the waterfront and its mix of older residential buildings and newer developments creates unique pest control challenges. Our team understands the specific needs of this neighborhood, from the historic homes near St. George Theatre to the residential towers overlooking New York Harbor, ensuring thorough treatment that protects your family and pets.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in St. George?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in St. George typically ranges from $350 to $650 depending on the size of your home or apartment and the severity of the infestation. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: How quickly can you treat a flea infestation in my St. George home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for St. George residents. Most flea treatments take 1-2 hours to complete, and you'll see significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours. Multiple treatments may be necessary for severe infestations.

faqs.question: Are your flea treatments safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved, pet-safe flea treatments that are highly effective yet safe for your family and pets. We recommend keeping pets and children away from treated areas for 2-4 hours after application, after which the space is completely safe.

faqs.question: Do you treat fleas in St. George apartment buildings?
faqs.answer: Yes, we regularly service apartment buildings throughout St. George, from pre-war buildings to modern high-rises near the ferry terminal. We can coordinate with building management for comprehensive treatment and work discreetly to address infestations in individual units or common areas.
